name: io.github.playquiznow/quiz
description: MCP server for PlayQuizNow — create and manage quizzes from AI tools like Claude Desktop. Supports multiple choice, polls, text answers, timed quizzes, negative marking, and scheduling.

environmentVariables.name: PLAYQUIZNOW_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your PlayQuizNow API key (starts with pqn_). Generate at https://playquiznow.com/api-keys

environmentVariables.name: PLAYQUIZNOW_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.playquiznow.com
